introSection: Coaster Express is a wooden roller coaster located at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. It opened on 6 April 2002 along with the park as Wild Wild West. It was renamed to Coaster Express in 2005.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains were built by Intamin.

fullText:
Coaster Express is a wooden roller coaster located at Parque Warner Madrid in San Martín de la Vega, Community of Madrid, Spain. It opened on 6 April 2002 along with the park as Wild Wild West. It was renamed to Coaster Express in 2005.



The trains were built by Intamin.
